easySetup.title: Easy Setup Wizard

information.name: Information Library
information.description: Offline access to Wikipedia, medical references, how-to guides, and encyclopedias

features.medical: Medical references and first aid guides
features.diy: DIY repair guides and how-to content

education.name: Education Platform
education.description: Interactive learning platform with video courses and exercises

features.khan: Khan Academy math and science courses

ai.description: Local AI chat that runs entirely on your hardware - no internet required

features.private: Private conversations that never leave your device
features.offline: No internet connection needed after setup
features.questions: Ask questions, get help with writing, brainstorm ideas
features.local: Runs on your own hardware with local AI models

notes.name: Notes
notes.description: Simple note-taking app with local storage

datatools.name: Data Tools

step1.heading: What do you want NOMAD to do?
step1.subheading: Select the capabilities you need. You can always add more later.
step1.allInstalled: All available capabilities are already installed!

step2.heading: Choose Map Regions
step2.subheading: Select map region collections to download for offline use. You can always download more regions later.
step2.noCollections: No map collections available at this time.

step3.heading: Choose Content
step3.subtextBoth: Select AI models and content categories for offline use.
step3.subtextAi: Select AI models to download for offline use.
step3.subtextInfo: Select content categories for offline knowledge.
step3.subtextDefault: Configure content for your selected capabilities.
step3.aiModelsSubtext: Select models to download for offline AI
step3.noModels: No recommended AI models available at this time.
step3.noContentCapabilities: No content-based capabilities selected. You can skip this step or go back to select capabilities that require content.

step4.heading: Review Your Selections
step4.subheading: Review your choices before starting the setup process.
step4.noSelectionsMessage: You haven't selected anything to install or download. You can go back to make selections or go back to the home page.
step4.readyToStartMessage: Click 'Complete Setup' to begin installing apps and downloading content. This may take some time depending on your internet connection and the size of the downloads.

easySetup.noInternetMessage: You'll need an internet connection to proceed. Please connect to the internet and try again.
easySetup.noInternetSetup: You must have an internet connection to complete the setup.
easySetup.setupComplete: Setup wizard completed! Your selections are being processed.
easySetup.setupError: An error occurred during setup. Some items may not have been processed.
easySetup.selectionSummary: {{capabilities}} {{capabilityLabel}}, {{maps}} map region{{mapPlural}}, {{categories}} content {{categoryLabel}}, {{models}} AI model{{modelPlural}} selected

apps.title: App Settings
apps.heading: Apps
apps.description: Manage the applications that are available in your Project N.O.M.A.D. instance. Nightly update checks will automatically detect when new versions of these apps are available.
apps.noInternetUpdates: You must have an internet connection to check for updates.
apps.installConfirm: Are you sure you want to install {{name}}? This will start the service and make it available in your Project N.O.M.A.D. instance. It may take some time to complete.
apps.noInternetInstall: You must have an internet connection to install services.
apps.installInternalError: An internal error occurred while trying to install the service.
apps.affectInternalError: An internal error occurred while trying to affect the service.
apps.forceReinstallConfirm: Are you sure you want to force reinstall {{name}}? This will WIPE ALL DATA for this service and cannot be undone. You should only do this if the service is malfunctioning and other troubleshooting steps have failed.
apps.forceReinstallInternalError: An internal error occurred while trying to force reinstall the service.
apps.stopConfirm: Are you sure you want to stop {{name}}?
apps.startConfirm: Are you sure you want to start {{name}}?
apps.restartConfirm: Are you sure you want to restart {{name}}?

system.title: System Information
system.heading: System Information
system.subtitle: Real-time monitoring and diagnostics • Last updated: {{time}} • Refreshing data every 30 seconds
system.highMemoryMessage: System memory usage exceeds 90%. Performance degradation may occur.
system.gpuNotAccessible: GPU Not Accessible to AI Assistant
system.gpuNotAccessibleMessage: Your system has an NVIDIA GPU, but the AI Assistant can't access it. AI is running on CPU only, which is significantly slower.
system.reinstallAiMessage: This will recreate the AI Assistant container with GPU support enabled. Your downloaded models will be preserved. The service will be briefly unavailable during reinstall.
system.reinstallSuccess: AI Assistant is being reinstalled with GPU support. This page will reload shortly.

common.noFilesProcessing: No files are currently being processed

easySetupComplete.title: Easy Setup Wizard Complete
easySetupComplete.noInternetMessage: It looks like you're not connected to the internet. Installing apps and downloading content will require an internet connection.
easySetupComplete.runningInBackgroundMessage: Feel free to leave this page at any time - your app installs and downloads will continue in the background! Please note, the Information Library (if installed) may be unavailable until all initial downloads complete.

mapsManager.title: Maps Manager
mapsManager.heading: Maps Manager
mapsManager.description: Manage your stored map files and explore new regions!
mapsManager.baseAssetsAlert: The base map assets have not been installed. Please download them first to enable map functionality.
mapsManager.baseAssetsError: An error occurred while downloading the base map assets. Please try again.
mapsManager.baseAssetsUnknownError: An unknown error occurred while downloading base assets.
mapsManager.downloadModalDescription: Enter the URL of the map region file you wish to download. The URL must be publicly reachable and end with .pmtiles. A preflight check will be run to verify the file's availability, type, and approximate size.
mapsManager.preflightPassed: Preflight check passed. Filename: {{filename}}, Size: {{size}} MB
mapsManager.preflightUnknownError: An unknown error occurred during the preflight check.
mapsManager.confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
mapsManager.confirmDownloadMessage: Are you sure you want to download {{name}}? It may take some time for it to be available depending on the file size and your internet connection.
mapsManager.allResourcesDownloaded: All resources in the collection "{{name}}" have already been downloaded.
mapsManager.downloadQueued: Download for collection "{{name}}" has been queued.

contentManager.title: Content Manager
contentManager.heading: Content Manager
contentManager.kiwixNotInstalled: The Kiwix application is not installed. Please install it to view downloaded ZIM files
contentManager.confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.

contentExplorer.title: Content Explorer
contentExplorer.heading: Content Explorer
contentExplorer.description: Browse and download content for offline reading!
contentExplorer.noInternet: No internet connection. You may not be able to download files.
contentExplorer.kiwixNotInstalled: The Kiwix application is not installed. Please install it to view downloaded content files.
contentExplorer.confirmDownloadMessage: Are you sure you want to download {{title}}? It may take some time for it to be available depending on the file size and your internet connection. The Kiwix application will be restarted after the download is complete.
contentExplorer.tierDownloadError: An error occurred while starting downloads.
contentExplorer.wikipediaSelectionError: An error occurred while changing Wikipedia selection

tierModal.selectTierDescription: Select a tier based on your storage capacity and needs. Higher tiers include all content from lower tiers.
tierModal.changeNote: You can change your selection at any time. Click Submit to confirm your choice.

wikipedia.title: Wikipedia
wikipedia.downloading: Downloading Wikipedia... This may take a while for larger packages.

models.title: {{name}} Settings
models.description: Easily manage the {{name}}'s settings and installed models. We recommend starting with smaller models first to see how they perform on your system before moving on to larger ones.
models.notInstalled: {{name}}'s dependencies are not installed. Please install them to manage AI models.
models.gpuNotAccessibleMessage: Your system has an NVIDIA GPU, but {{name}} can't access it. AI is running on CPU only, which is significantly slower.
models.reinstallMessage: This will recreate the {{name}} container with GPU support enabled. Your downloaded models will be preserved. The service will be briefly unavailable during reinstall.
models.reinstallSuccess: {{name}} is being reinstalled with GPU support. This page will reload shortly.
models.chatSuggestionsDescription: Display AI-generated conversation starters in the chat interface
models.assistantNameHelp: Give your AI assistant a custom name that will be used in the chat interface and other areas of the application.
models.deleteModelMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this model? You will need to download it again if you want to use it in the future.
models.downloadInitiated: Model download initiated for {{name}}. It may take some time to complete.
models.downloadError: There was an error installing the model: {{name}}. Please try again.
models.deleteError: There was an error deleting the model: {{name}}. Please try again.
models.settingUpdateError: There was an error updating the setting. Please try again.

update.title: System Update
update.heading: System Update
update.description: Keep your Project N.O.M.A.D. instance up to date with the latest features and improvements.
update.containerRestartingMessage: The admin container is restarting. This page will reload automatically when the update is complete.
update.connectionLostMessage: You may see error notifications while the backend restarts during the update. This is completely normal and expected. Connection should be restored momentarily.
update.newVersionAvailable: A new version ({{version}}) is available for your Project N.O.M.A.D. instance.
update.runningLatest: Your system is running the latest version!
update.step1Description: Downloads the newest Docker images for all core containers
update.step2Description: Safely stops and recreates all core containers with the new images
update.step3Description: This page will automatically reload when the update is complete
update.backupReminderMessage: While updates are designed to be safe, it's always recommended to backup any critical data before proceeding.
update.temporaryDowntimeMessage: Services will be briefly unavailable during the update process. This typically takes 2-5 minutes depending on your internet connection.
update.enableEarlyAccessDescription: Receive release candidate (RC) versions before they are officially released. Note: RC versions may contain bugs and are not recommended for environments where stability and data integrity are critical.
update.contentUpdatesDescription: Check if newer versions of your installed ZIM files and maps are available.
update.allContentUpToDateMessage: All your installed content is running the latest available version.
update.failedToCheckUpdates: Failed to check for content updates
update.settingUpdateError: There was an error updating the setting. Please try again.
update.subscribeHeading: Want to stay updated with the latest from Project N.O.M.A.D.? Subscribe to receive release notes directly to your inbox. Unsubscribe anytime.
update.privacyNote: We care about your privacy. Project N.O.M.A.D. will never share your email with third parties or send you spam.

benchmark.title: System Benchmark
benchmark.heading: System Benchmark
benchmark.description: Measure your server's performance and compare with the NOMAD community
benchmark.aiRequiredMessage: Full benchmark requires {{name}} to be installed. Install it to measure your complete NOMAD capability and share results with the community.
benchmark.benchmarkDescription: Run a benchmark to measure your system's CPU, memory, disk, and AI inference performance. The benchmark takes approximately 2-5 minutes to complete.
benchmark.aiNotInstalledSuffix: to run full benchmarks and share results with the community.
benchmark.aiOnlyTooltip: {{name}} must be installed to run AI benchmark
benchmark.nomadScoreDescription: Your NOMAD Score is a weighted composite of all benchmark results.
benchmark.shareDescription: Share your benchmark on the community leaderboard. Choose a Builder Tag to claim your spot, or share anonymously.
benchmark.shareAnonymously: Share anonymously (no Builder Tag shown on leaderboard)
benchmark.alreadySubmitted: A benchmark for this system with the same or higher score has already been submitted.
benchmark.partialBenchmarkMessage: This {{type}} benchmark cannot be shared with the community. Run a Full Benchmark with {{name}} installed to share your results.
benchmark.sharedMessage: Your benchmark has been submitted to the community leaderboard. Thanks for contributing!
benchmark.tokensPerSecondTooltip: How fast the AI generates text. Higher is better. 30+ tokens/sec feels responsive, 60+ feels instant.
benchmark.timeToFirstTokenTooltip: How quickly the AI starts responding after you send a message. Lower is better. Under 500ms feels instant.
benchmark.noAIDataMessage: Run a Full Benchmark or AI Only benchmark to measure AI inference performance.
benchmark.noBenchmarkResultsMessage: Run your first benchmark to see your server's performance scores.

progress.downloadingAiModel: Downloading AI benchmark model (first run only)...

legal.title: Legal Notices
legal.heading: Legal Notices
legal.licenseText1: Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with the License. You may obtain a copy of the License at
legal.licenseText2: Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS, WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied. See the License for the specific language governing permissions and limitations under the License.
legal.thirdPartyIntro: Project N.O.M.A.D. integrates the following open source projects. We are grateful to their developers and communities:
legal.kiwixDescription: Offline Wikipedia and content reader (GPL-3.0 License)
legal.kolibriDescription: Offline learning platform by Learning Equality (MIT License)
legal.ollamaDescription: Local large language model runtime (MIT License)
legal.cyberchefDescription: Data analysis and encoding toolkit by GCHQ (Apache 2.0 License)
legal.qdrantDescription: Vector search engine for AI knowledge base (Apache 2.0 License)
legal.privacyIntro: Project N.O.M.A.D. is designed with privacy as a core principle:
legal.zeroTelemetryText: N.O.M.A.D. does not collect, transmit, or store any usage data, analytics, or telemetry.
legal.localFirstText: All your data, downloaded content, AI conversations, and notes remain on your device.
legal.noAccountsText: N.O.M.A.D. operates without user accounts or authentication by default.
legal.networkOptionalText: An internet connection is only required to download content or updates. All installed features work fully offline.
legal.contentDisclaimerText1: Project N.O.M.A.D. provides tools to download and access content from third-party sources including Wikipedia, Wikibooks, medical references, educational platforms, and other publicly available resources.
legal.contentDisclaimerText2: Crosstalk Solutions, LLC does not create, control, verify, or guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or reliability of any third-party content. The inclusion of any content does not constitute an endorsement.
legal.contentDisclaimerText3: Users are responsible for evaluating the appropriateness and accuracy of any content they download and use.
legal.medicalDisclaimerText1: Some content available through N.O.M.A.D. includes medical references, first aid guides, and emergency preparedness information. This content is provided for general informational purposes only.
legal.medicalDisclaimerText2: This information is NOT a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.
legal.medicalPoint1: Always seek the advice of qualified health providers with questions about medical conditions.
legal.medicalPoint2: Never disregard professional medical advice or delay seeking it because of something you read in offline content.
legal.medicalPoint3: In a medical emergency, call emergency services immediately if available.
legal.medicalPoint4: Medical information may become outdated. Verify critical information with current professional sources when possible.
legal.dataStorageIntro: All data associated with Project N.O.M.A.D. is stored locally on your device:
legal.applicationDataValue: Stored in Docker volumes on your local system
legal.dataStorageNote: You maintain full control over your data. Uninstalling N.O.M.A.D. or deleting these directories will permanently remove all associated data.

updateService.title: Update Service
updateService.dataPreserved: Your data and configuration will be preserved during the update.
updateService.majorVersionWarning: It's not recommended to upgrade to a new major version (e.g. 1.8.2 → 2.0.0) unless you have verified compatibility with your current configuration. Always review the release notes and test in a staging environment if possible.

chat.interactWithModels: Interact with your installed language models directly in the Command Center.
chat.enableSuggestions: Need some inspiration? Enable chat suggestions in settings to get started with example prompts.
chat.errorNoResponse: Sorry, I could not generate a response.
chat.errorProcessing: Sorry, there was an error processing your request. Please try again.
chat.clearAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all chat sessions? This action cannot be undone and all conversations will be permanently deleted.
chat.typePlaceholder: Type your message to {{name}}... (Shift+Enter for new line)
chat.ragModelNotInstalled: The {{model}} model is not installed. Consider <button>downloading it</button> for improved retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) performance.
chat.downloadModelDescription: This will dispatch a background download job for {{model}} and may take some time to complete. The model will be used to rewrite queries for improved RAG retrieval performance.
chat.uploadSuccess: Document uploaded and queued for processing
chat.syncDescription: This will scan the NOMAD's storage directories for any new files and queue them for processing. This is useful if you've manually added files to the storage or want to ensure everything is up to date. This may cause a temporary increase in resource usage if new files are found and being processed. Are you sure you want to proceed?
chat.syncSuccess: Storage synced successfully. If new files were found, they have been queued for processing.
chat.whyUpload: Why upload documents to your Knowledge Base?
chat.kbIntegrationDescription: When you upload documents to your Knowledge Base, NOMAD processes and embeds the content, making it directly accessible to {{name}}. This allows {{name}} to reference your specific documents during conversations, providing more accurate and personalized responses based on your uploaded data.
chat.ocrDescription: NOMAD includes built-in Optical Character Recognition (OCR) capabilities, allowing it to extract text from image-based documents such as scanned PDFs or photos. This means that even if your documents are not in a standard text format, NOMAD can still process and embed their content for AI access.
chat.libraryDescription: NOMAD will automatically discover and extract any content you save to your Information Library (if installed), making it instantly available to {{name}} without any extra steps.

support.title: Support the Project
support.subtitle: Project NOMAD is 100% free and open source — no subscriptions, no paywalls, no catch. If you'd like to help keep the project going, here are a few ways to show your support.
support.kofiDescription: Every contribution helps fund development, server costs, and new content packs for NOMAD. Even a small donation goes a long way.
support.rogueTitle: Need Help With Your Home Network?
support.rogueBannerAlt: Rogue Support — Conquer Your Home Network
support.rogueDescription: Rogue Support is a networking consultation service for home users. Think of it as Uber for computer networking — expert help when you need it.
support.starOnGithubSuffix: it helps more people discover NOMAD
support.shareNomad: Share NOMAD with someone who'd use it — word of mouth is the best marketing
support.joinDiscordSuffix: hang out, share your build, help other users

debugInfo.title: Debug Info
debugInfo.description: This is non-sensitive system info you can share when reporting issues. No passwords, IPs, or API keys are included.
debugInfo.loadFailed: Failed to load debug info. Please try again.
